title: Test reliability — enable differential tests, fix sample_workflow_e2e, harden flaky tests
purpose: The differential JIT test suite (tests/differential.rs) is behind a feature gate and never runs in CI or cargo test, meaning JIT/interpreter divergence goes undetected. The sample_workflow_e2e test fails because the sample workflow hits an unimplemented BIF or runtime error that returns ExitReason::Error — but the error is opaque (Term(4398215108)) with no diagnostic. Two tests are flaky due to timing/fd-race conditions. This brief fixes all four test reliability issues so the full test suite is green and stays green.
task: Remove the differential feature gate so differential tests run by default. Investigate and fix the sample_workflow_e2e failure (likely missing BIF or runtime error). Harden the two flaky tests (cleanup_exited_process_closes_fd_resources_owned_by_process and dirty_nif_round_trip_does_not_block_normal_scheduler) with proper synchronization instead of timing assumptions.

requirements.title: Enable differential tests by default
requirements.spec: Remove the #![cfg(feature = "differential")] gate from tests/differential.rs. Add any missing dev-dependencies (proptest is already in dev-deps). Ensure cargo test -p beamr --test differential passes. If any differential tests fail due to known JIT limitations, mark them with #[ignore] and a comment naming the limitation, rather than gating the entire file.
acceptance: cargo test -p beamr --test differential runs without --features differential
All passing differential tests continue to pass
Any JIT-limited tests are individually #[ignore]d with a reason comment
The differential feature flag is removed from Cargo.toml

requirements.title: Fix sample_workflow_e2e test failure
requirements.spec: Investigate why sample_workflow_e2e returns ExitReason::Error instead of Normal. Use take_exit_error/take_exit_exception from the scheduler to identify the crash reason. Fix the underlying issue — likely a missing BIF, incorrect arity, or unimplemented opcode. If the fix requires new BIF implementations, add them. The test shall pass with ExitReason::Normal.
acceptance: The sample workflow completes with ExitReason::Normal
The output file is written to the expected path
No new Box::leak sites are introduced

requirements.title: Harden flaky process cleanup test
requirements.spec: Fix cleanup_exited_process_closes_fd_resources_owned_by_process to use synchronization primitives (e.g. condvar or channel) instead of timing-based assumptions. The test fails intermittently due to a pipe fd race — the cleanup runs before the fd is fully registered, or after it is already closed.
acceptance: Test passes reliably in 100 consecutive runs

requirements.title: Harden flaky dirty NIF test
requirements.spec: Fix dirty_nif_round_trip_does_not_block_normal_scheduler to use synchronization primitives instead of timing assumptions. The test fails intermittently because the dirty NIF completion races with the scheduler's polling interval.
acceptance: Test passes reliably in 100 consecutive runs
No sleep-based synchronization beyond the dirty NIF's actual work

boundaries: Differential tests that fail due to known JIT limitations are marked #[ignore], not deleted
sample_workflow_e2e fix addresses the immediate crash — deeper workflow coverage is separate
Flaky test fixes use proper synchronization, not longer timeouts
OUT OF SCOPE: Adding new differential test scenarios — only enabling existing ones
OUT OF SCOPE: Changing the sample workflow's Gleam source code
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with zero failures
cargo test -p beamr --test differential passes without --features flag
cargo test -p beamr --test no_box_leak passes (no regression from other changes)
